props.ChoiceText: You carried a revered relic through a restless crowd and felt the weight of every eye on it.
props.ChoiceBio: Relic duty taught you how easily sacred objects gather fear, hope, and politics around them.

0.TransitionText: Because relic duty taught you how easily sacred objects gather fear, hope, and politics around them, duty and doctrine bound you more tightly to religious service.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because relic duty taught you how easily sacred objects gather fear, hope, and politics around them, piety near power taught you how much faith depends on influence and ceremony.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Courtier, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because relic duty taught you how easily sacred objects gather fear, hope, and politics around them, judgment mattered more than mercy, drawing you toward the Inquisition.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Inquisitioner, but you may remain on your current path instead.
